kicker: RT LEVEL II // DEPTH BY PARALLAX

beats.narration: A radiograph flattens the part: length and width survive, depth doesn't. The welder still asks which side to dig from.

payload.title: THE MISSING DEPTH
payload.sub: Parallax puts the third dimension back.

beats.narration: Tube shift: two half exposures on one film, moving only the source. Every flaw prints twice. The higher it floats, the bigger the jump.

payload.heading: Shift the source — the flaw jumps
payload.note: THE HIGHER THE FLAW, THE BIGGER THE JUMP

beats.narration: One line: height equals image shift, times source to film distance, divided by source shift plus image shift. Three inches up. Excavate from the top.

payload.heading: One line turns the jump into depth

beats.narration: Trust comes from habit: clamp part and film, shift generously, fifteen to twenty percent of S F D, and lead markers on both surfaces.
Find the flaw, fix its depth, and protect the film that proves it: edges only, cool and dry. That's Level two craft.

payload.sub: Edges only, cool and dry — the record lasts.
